subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Bayan calleth out unto this Name and circleth round the will of its Lord, yet the people remain in manifest error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البیان ینادی بهذا الاسم و یطوف حول اراده ربه ولکن القوم فی وهم مبین انا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @belief and denial, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
